title: Timeless Power
description: Accelerate time with Pucci's [Made in Heaven] ability from JoJo's Bizarre Adventures: Stone Ocean!
body:
**Timeless Power** is a simple mod that allows you to activate Enrico Pucci's [Made in Heaven] ability and accelerate time!

 This mod adds 2 items to the game - **Made in Heaven** clock and **Herobrine's Diary**.

With **Made in Heaven** you can accelerate the passage of time, which affects the speed of the day and night, speed of weather changing and potion effects.
It also can affect crop growth rate, this feature disabled by default, you can enable it with the command below.
[Made in Heaven] has 6 stages where stage 1 is a slight speed up and stage 6 is almost a 1 day/second speed.

  You can control the time acceleration by pressing **X/Z** keys on your keyboard. Also, with acceleration of time, you're getting self-speedup you can disable with **C** key.
You can change keybinds in settings.
**Herobrine's Diary** can be bought from **Cleric** and describes **The Heaven Plan** - a way to get **Made in Heaven**.
 Also you can change some settings of **Made in Heaven** with /timelesspower command.

**Important! Timeless Power 2.0+ requires [Hourglass](https://modrinth.com/mod/hourglass)!**

**Supported Languages:**
- English
- Russian(Русский)
- Ukranian(Український)
- Belarusian(Беларускі)
- Polish(Polski)
- Danish(Dansk)
- French(Français)
- Italian(Italiano)
- Spanish(Español)
- German(Deutsch)
- Finnish(Suomen)
- Portugalian(Portuguesa)

**[Made with MCreator](https://mcreator.net/modification/91902/timeless-power)**

**Have fun!**
